---
title: "An exploratory investigation into the factors related to EdTech use among Kenyan girls"
subtitle: "Published · British Journal of Educational Technology (2023)"
author: "with Joe Watson, Winnie Mughogho & Mark Millrine"
description: "What shapes whether Kenyan girls take up and use educational technology.<br><a href='https://doi.org/10.1111/bjet.13307'>Paper (open access)</a>"
categories: ["Skills & Learning", "Development"]
---

[Paper (open access)](https://doi.org/10.1111/bjet.13307)
